tweets.text: The Robot helped me write a query to get the top-emitting assets across the globe for 2021! https://t.co/6BTSHAS0TW
Now I'm having davinci-002 write sqlite queries for me, which is nice https://t.co/TB9UwiG9DQ https://t.co/ecQ8dDrcbn

Taking a short break... when I come back, building a little local db of every single asset so we can see who the worst polluters are across all countries and sectors and see what impact removing them would make on global emissions

About 45 minutes in, and we are calculating the total emissions for each sector and getting a number for total emissions- then we can start using our shopping cart to subtract from those emissions- it takes a lot! https://t.co/Ci4sKFZdAB

🔴 8PM EST: I'm gonna be live coding again on YouTube https://t.co/TB9UwiG9DQ
